category_sources: Official Google Code archive homepage is the project homepage for hostdb.
source_facts.description says it generates DNS zones and DHCP configuration from hostlist.txt.
display_name_sources: source_facts.description and project naming support the conventional display name HostDB.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official archived Google Code project; no separate official docs surface was found, so the homepage is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage is an official Google Code archive page, but no official source-control repository URL was found beyond archived downloads.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies DNS zones, DHCP configuration, and hostlist.txt.
source_facts.executables lists zone and hostdb utilities such as mkzones, mknamedconf, and zone2hostdb.
